payload.title: Stripe billing integration + plan-tier enforcement
payload.description: Integrate Stripe (Checkout + Customer Portal, plus metered usage records for event overage). A webhook writes the resolved plan/tier onto the tenant row that the quota checks read. Define the free-tier boundary (1 project, ~2 seats, low events/day, few SSE connections). Entirely server-side at the tenant boundary; does not touch the offline-first client path. NOTE: assumes the recommended per-project-tier model — if Bri picks per-agent/usage pricing, this story's plan-definition scope shifts but the metering plumbing (SCP-157) is unaffected. Depends on SCP-157 and SCP-158. (From SCP-127.)
